action.name: Find in this folder
action.description: Search for files within this folder

action.name: Media: Concatenate files
action.submenu: Scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools
action.command: bash "/home/wizzdom/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools/Media: Concatenate files" %F

action.name: Media: Remove metadata
action.submenu: Scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools
action.command: bash "/home/wizzdom/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools/Media: Remove metadata" %F

action.command: bash "/home/wizzdom/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools/Media: Show basic metadata" %F
